meta.title: Chihuahuas for Grandma
meta.subtitle: Dogs we picked out — tap one for the full story.

targetWeightLbs.note: Goal is ~5–6 lbs; always confirm with the rescue.

dogs.name: Tiki
dogs.postedAt: ~1 month ago on Adopt a Pet (verify on site)
dogs.listingUpdatedAt: ~1 month ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.personality: Listing notes: good with kids and dogs. Purebred. Personality tags not filled on Adopt a Pet.
dogs.summary: Young chi puppy — fee $400, weight not listed on page.
dogs.myStory: Listed under Rescue Fenix (501(c)(3), volunteer rescue). Contact: info@rescuefenix.org, rescuefenix.org.
dogs.health: Shots current per listing. Spay/neuter status not spelled out in snippet — confirm with rescue.
dogs.details: Details on listing: Good with kids, good with dogs, purebred.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Rescue states: “Our goal is to make the perfect match!” Full steps on their Adopt a Pet page and rescue site.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Short blurb on site only — expect application and rescue approval like other Fenix dogs; confirm on the live Adopt a Pet listing.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Puppy energy and unknown weight vs. your 5–6 lb lap-dog goal — worth asking weight and temperament directly. Good with kids/dogs per listing.

dogs.name: Paco
dogs.postedAt: ~2+ months ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.listingUpdatedAt: ~3 weeks ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.personality: Good with kids and dogs; purebred. Listing does not use “snuggly” wording.
dogs.summary: Tiny 2 lb puppy boy — $400, Rescue Fenix.
dogs.myStory: Rescue Fenix — volunteer 501(c)(3). Same adoption flow family as Tiki/Nacho.
dogs.details: Purebred, good with kids and dogs.
dogs.adoptionProcess: “Our goal is to make the perfect match!” — see listing and rescue site for application.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Apply through rescue; they emphasize matching pet to home. $400 fee on listing.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Very light at 2 lbs (below your target range but still growing). Puppy = energy and training. Confirm expected adult size with rescue.

dogs.name: Tula
dogs.postedAt: ~3 days ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.personality: Listing traits: Affectionate, Chill, Curious, Gentle, Patient, Quiet, Snuggly. Good with kids and dogs; housetrained.
dogs.summary: Young adult chi — snuggly/chill tags, $500, weight not on page.
dogs.myStory: Dulce Vida Animal Rescue — mission per listing: rescue, rehab, rehome sick/abused/abandoned dogs and cats.
dogs.details: Housetrained per listing. Apply online button on Adopt a Pet.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Listing shows adoption process as “N/A” in the expandable — follow “Apply Online” and email adoptions@dulcevidarescue.org.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Fee $500. Site had minimal process text; use Apply Online and contact the rescue for steps.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Strong lap-dog signals from traits (Snuggly, Quiet, Chill). Weight missing — ask rescue. Good match to explore if she stays small.

dogs.name: Milo
dogs.color: Not listed on Adopt a Pet
dogs.postedAt: Posted 2+ months ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.adoptionFee: Not listed on page — ask rescue
dogs.personality: Purebred per listing; no personality word list on snippet.
dogs.summary: Senior small chi, 3 lbs — adult lap size, fee not shown on page.
dogs.myStory: Cared for by Wet Noses Rescue. Email info@wetnosesrescue.org · wetnosesrescue.org.
dogs.details: Purebred. Process: Submit application → Interview → Home check (per listing steps).
dogs.adoptionProcess: 1) Submit application 2) Interview 3) Home check — per Adopt a Pet listing for Milo.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Structured application, interview, and home check. Adoption fee not shown in listing text we copied — confirm with Wet Noses Rescue.
dogs.fitAnalysis: 3 lbs is under your 5–6 lb target but very portable; older dog may be calmer — ask about temperament and handling.

dogs.name: Latte
dogs.caretakerName: Chihuahua Rescue of San Diego County
dogs.personality: Mix; no trait list in snippet — dogs live in private foster homes per rescue blurb.
dogs.summary: 6 lb mix — right in target weight, $350.
dogs.myStory: All-volunteer; dogs in foster homes, not a shelter. rescueachi.com
dogs.adoptionProcess: Application at http://rescueachi.com/adoption-application/ → approval → meet dog (often via foster) → possible home visit → contract and fee. Landlord contact if you rent.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Apply online, get approved, meet in person (often through foster), possible home inspection, then contract and $350 fee.
dogs.fitAnalysis: 6 lbs matches your goal band. Terrier mix may add spark — meet him and ask foster about lap/cuddle style.

dogs.name: Pebbles
dogs.caretakerName: Chihuahua Rescue of San Diego County
dogs.postedAt: Very recent on Adopt a Pet
dogs.personality: Adult female, 3 lbs — listing did not paste trait words here.
dogs.summary: Tiny 3 lb adult girl — $400, same rescue as Latte.
dogs.myStory: Chihuahua Rescue of San Diego County — foster-based.
dogs.details: Same adoption process family as Latte (CRSD).
dogs.adoptionProcess: Same as Latte: application, approval, meet, possible home visit, contract, fee.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: $400 fee; apply at rescueachi.com/adoption-application/ then follow their foster meet process.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Lighter than 5–6 lb goal but adult — may be calmer; confirm personality with foster.

dogs.name: Jelly
dogs.personality: Good with kids and dogs per listing.
dogs.myStory: Foster-based program; dogs socialized in foster homes. info@secondchancedogrescue.org
dogs.details: Second Chance: questionnaire before meet, contract, fees, 2-week trial; puppy may need training deposit per listing.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Complete Adoption Questionnaire (online or in person) before meeting dogs → Adoption Contract and fees → 2-week trial. Puppy adoptions may require refundable training deposit with proof of training completion.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Questionnaire first, then contract and fee; two-week trial. Possible puppy training deposit — read listing carefully.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Puppy + terrier mix + unknown weight = more uncertainty for a strict small lap-dog profile; still worth asking size expectations.

dogs.name: Nacho
dogs.personality: Good with kids and dogs; purebred.
dogs.myStory: Same rescue group as Tiki and Paco.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Rescue Fenix: “Our goal is to make the perfect match!”
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: $400; apply via rescue — short public process text, so ask them for steps.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Very small now; puppy behavior. Aligns on breed but not on age/energy vs. quiet lap life yet.

dogs.name: Magnolia
dogs.postedAt: ~1 day ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.personality: Affectionate, Curious, Gentle, Playful, Snuggly. Good with kids and dogs.
dogs.summary: 4 lb puppy girl — traits include Snuggly, $495.
dogs.myStory: ALMA rescues from Mexico, full vet care, foster homes in Baja/Tijuana and transport. almarescue.org
dogs.details: If you rent, listing says landlord letter required for breed approval.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Renters need landlord letter that dogs are allowed and breed is approved. Otherwise follow ALMA’s application flow on their site.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: $495; snuggly/playful puppy. Landlord paperwork if renting — see listing.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Snuggly + gentle tags fit Grandma goals; still a puppy. 4 lbs now — ask expected adult weight.

dogs.name: Juniper
dogs.postedAt: ~1 day ago on Adopt a Pet
dogs.personality: Affectionate, Curious, Gentle, Playful, Snuggly. Good with kids and dogs.
dogs.summary: ALMA puppy — same profile as Magnolia (litter mates possible).
dogs.myStory: Same rescue and address as Magnolia; compare listings before applying to both.
dogs.details: Landlord letter if renting (same ALMA policy).
dogs.adoptionProcess: Same as Magnolia — landlord letter for renters; contact ALMA.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: $495; snuggly puppy from ALMA. Confirm with rescue you are not double-booking meet times.
dogs.fitAnalysis: Same snuggly puppy profile as Magnolia — pick one or ask rescue which pup fits your home best.

dogs.name: Corazón
dogs.personality: Good with kids, dogs, cats; housetrained per listing.
dogs.summary: 10 lbs — above your small target; cat-friendly + housetrained.
dogs.myStory: Individual rescuer Yuribia — dogs from Tijuana, San Diego, LA. Email 4theloveofdogsoceanside@gmail.com
dogs.details: Larger than typical 5–6 lb goal; good if you want sturdier small dog.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Applications reviewed in order; they reply or call with questions to ensure fit.
dogs.adoptionProcessSummary: Email/contact through Adopt a Pet; informal process per listing — ask fee and steps.
dogs.howToApply: Ask About Me on Adopt a Pet / email rescuer
dogs.fitAnalysis: 10 lbs is well above your target band; positives: housetrained, good with cats. Best if Grandma wants a slightly bigger chi.
